comments.text: Building on [AxCl24], $K_4$ was also shown to lack this property in (F. C. Clemen and A. Z. Wagner, "Balanced edge-colorings avoiding rainbow cliques of size four", Electron. J. Combin. 30 (2023), P3.17). (The reference was located by GPT-5.) (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
